title: commiphora ovalifolia
intro: Commiphora ovalifolia, also known as African myrrh, is a plant species in the burseraceae family that is native to Africa and the Middle East. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Commiphora ovalifolia include wound healing, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting immune function. Commiphora ovalifolia is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, capsules, and topical creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
